characters.description_1: Visibly annoyed and tired of being outdoors with an elderly person.

characters.description_2: Smiling figure who enjoys walking outside, possibly harboring mischief or darker intentions towards the woman. Appears to be well-dressed and carries a rapier.

characters.name: Laughing voice of Majik III
characters.description: Another individual involved in this strange encounter who seems amused by their situation, possibly enjoying tormenting others as entertainment.

locations.location_1: Historic building façade/reception area of Majik II's abode
locations.description_1: A large historic building with stonework that is part of the residence or estate owned by one of the mysterious figures.

locations.description_2: Unexpectedly windy, a gust strong enough to fling an individual through the air, leading her into Majik II's building.
